package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_type_outside_middleware_package: Shared middleware types and constructors declared in handlers or services instead of a middleware-focused package.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule091NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule091NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule091NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario091Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule091NegativeService, input Rule091NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
